title: Chassis frame Engineering Evidence Brief A/B; acquire fleet+brochure PDFs; open Mission D
reason: Lock global bumper-referenced datums and F-450 Regular Cab dimensional evidence from acquired fleet specs, initialize frame CFGCOMP/IFACE graph, and choose next subsystem mission without inventing suspension architecture.
decision: Admit Engineering Evidence Brief A/B under CFG-2019-F450-REG-CAB-4X2-60CA-DRW with pollution filter (no pickup/4x4/alt-WB/F-350 track inheritance).
Acquire+hash SRC-CAND-000010 (fleet specs) and SRC-CAND-000011 (Skeeter 2020/02 brochure path).
Mark dimensional claims ASSERTION_EXTRACTED with page cites from F-450 Regular Cab tables; record dual curb/loaded frame-height values (35.0/35.9 and 28.7/28.6).
Register CFGCOMP-2019-F450-RC-4X2-60CA-DRW-FRAME + rails + IFACE-UPFITTER; edges CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED / PROCEDURE_GENERATION_NOT_AUTHORIZED.
HSLA 50 ksi and upfitter drill/weld rules remain DOCUMENT_SUPPORTED_PENDING_TOKEN_ANCHOR.
Select Option A: authorize MISN-000004 (4x2 Steering & Front Suspension). Defer Option B as MISN-000005.
Do not invent Twin-I-Beam vs solid-axle architecture in this decision.
